channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Sofa dumped 5 days ago, 15th March
item.description:
Sofa been dumped 5 days ago No one has collected it Was in middle of car park note on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aden Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping, suitcases and old children's toys. Please come and get it, thank you!, 15th March
item.description:
Angela Hicks, I live in the flat on the corner of Linnell and Vestry Roads, there is often fly-tipping.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Vestry Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flooding of road at junction, 15th March
item.description:
This is a constant issue following rain. Flooding is often significantly worse than this and pushes pesdestrians into the main road with speeding traffic. There is no drain gulley in the vicinty and the fall of the road surface is wrong and does not drain.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Herbert Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small green litterbin overflowing as usual, 15th March
item.description:
Why is this bin left full and overflowing before every weekend? Please empty.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Mead Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lincoln mews outside brent garages / electricity sub statiom, 15th March
item.description:
Domestic bedding / appliances dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Raised pavement edge near J bus stop (Lambeth Rd/Kennington Rd) on Lambeth Road, 15th March
item.description:
Raised edge of paving stone that is a trip hazard. I tripped over it as I was about to get on a bus and landed with my head in the gutter between the bus and the kerb. This was on the 27th of February. I don't know how long it had been like this. The location is just a bit along from the bus stop opposite the church and Premier Inn and near number 132 Lambeth Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 130-134, Lambeth Road, Lambeth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged verge, 15th March
item.description:
Saw a van turn into drive and then turn back out. They had mounted the grass and once they left, I could see they did a lot of damage to the grass which now looks unsightly and needs fixing please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped wooden pallet, 15th March
item.description:
The pallet had been here for three months placed behind public bin.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stone Park Avenue, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 20 Glengall Rd, 15th March
item.description:
Bagged waste plus a broken chair dumped on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag
